ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "franchise_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the franchise of the product */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the product (e.g., new, used, mint) */,
  "price" REAL /* Current listing price of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Available quantity of the product */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the seller who listed the product */,
  "picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the product picture */,
  "shipping_weight" REAL /* Weight of the product for shipping */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the product details were last updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_franchise_id FOREIGN KEY ("franchise_id") REFERENCES franchises ("franchise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_seller_id FOREIGN KEY ("seller_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sold product */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the buyer */,
  "sold_price" REAL /* Price at which the product was sold */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping for the sale */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the sale */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the sale (including price, shipping, and tax) */,
  "date_sold" TEXT /* Date and time the product was sold */,
  "days_sold" INTEGER /* Number of days the product was on sale before it was sold */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shipping address of the buyer */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment method used for the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., seller, buyer, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the default shipping address of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the user last logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for feedback entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who gave feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the product (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment regarding the product */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback is anonymous */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the feedback helpful */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the feedback was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sale */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., sale, refund) */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date and time the transaction occurred */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded if the transaction is a refund */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when stock falls below the reorder level */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wishlists" (
  "wishlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wishlist entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the wishlist */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product in the wishlist */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes added by the user for the wishlist item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the wishlist was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wishlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wishlists_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wishlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who viewed the product */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date and time the product was viewed */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the view in seconds */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to view the product (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_views_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the payment method */,
  "payment_type" TEXT /* Type of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the payment service */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Account number or payment identifier */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the payment method is the default for the user */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date for credit card payments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_methods_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., user action, system event) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "franchises" (
  "franchise_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each franchise */,
  "franchise_name" TEXT /* Name of the franchise */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the franchise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("franchise_id")
)
